title: Chinese training program helps reduce poverty in Zambia - People's Daily Online
impact_evidence: Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Employment creation and job security -> "over 300 youths have been trained so far in village chicken rearing by the Chinese and a good number of the trained youths will become employers for their fellow youths thereby reducing of unemployment levels in the district." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Income generation and poverty reduction -> "Training of youths and women in village chicken is going to economically empower farmers not only in Luanshya district but the entire Copperbelt province and Zambia as a whole." | "From my chicken rearing business I have been able to buy a plot and soon I will start building my own poultry house, I am copying the Chinese way of doing things." | "in a month he makes about 160 U.S. dollars, about Kwacha three thousand local currency, from the sale of his birds." | "training in poultry farming by the Chinese experts has greatly helped him to improve his living standards economically and make the ends meet for his family." || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Business opportunities (local supply chains, services) -> "I am rearing over a thousand chickens, and I mostly sell my Chickens to Chinese nationals, I have customers from China Non-Ferrous Metal mining Luanshya Mine, the Chinese enjoy village chickens very much," || Social | Livelihoods & Economy | Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development) -> "there were Chinese who were training youths in village chicken rearing" | "Zambia Co-operative Union which partnered with Jilin University of China to train us in Village Chicken rearing,"

impact_level3: Employment creation and job security || Income generation and poverty reduction || Business opportunities (local supply chains, services) || Human capital development (skills, training, workforce development)
